# Architectural Context
*Things Claude cannot infer from current code alone. Generated by /mine-history on 2026-03-31. Analysis window: last 6 weeks (2026-02-18 – 2026-03-31).*

---

## Technology decisions

- **`langgraph-cli` was removed (2026-03-30)** — replaced by a native LangGraph Platform API implementation inside the gateway (`app/gateway/`). Do not add `langgraph-cli` back as a dependency or use its CLI commands. The gateway now directly implements the platform API contract. Commit: `34e835b`

- **`deerflow-harness` workspace package was introduced (2026-03-14)** — all model provider libraries (`langchain-openai`, `langchain-deepseek`, `langchain-mcp-adapters`, etc.) moved into the `packages/harness/` workspace package under the `deerflow.*` import namespace. The root `backend/pyproject.toml` now lists `deerflow-harness` as a workspace dependency. New model/tool code goes in `packages/harness/deerflow/`.

- **`kubernetes` and `duckdb` dependencies were removed (around 2026-02-12)** — both were present in `backend/pyproject.toml` ~6 weeks ago and are now absent. The removal was part of refactoring; do not re-add without understanding why they were dropped.

- **IM channel integrations (Feishu, Slack, Telegram) were added (2026-03-08)** — new dependencies: `lark-oapi`, `slack-sdk`, `python-telegram-bot`. The `app/channels/` package is the integration layer. These are now first-class citizens, not experiments.

---

## Structural evolution

- **Backend split into harness (`deerflow.*`) and app (`app.*`) (2026-03-14)** — what was `backend/src/` is now two layers:
  - `backend/packages/harness/deerflow/` — publishable framework, imports as `deerflow.*`
  - `backend/app/` — gateway (FastAPI REST) + IM channels, imports as `app.*`
  - Boundary rule: harness never imports from app. Enforced by `backend/tests/test_harness_boundary.py`.
  - If you see old `src.*` imports anywhere (docs, scripts, external tools), they are stale. Current code uses `deerflow.*` and `app.*`.

- **`config_version` field added to `config.yaml` (2026-03-14)** — the config file now has a `config_version: 1` field. On startup, `AppConfig.from_file()` checks this and warns if the local config is behind `config.example.yaml`. Run `make config-upgrade` or `scripts/config-upgrade.sh` to auto-migrate when upgrading.

---

## Active migrations (in progress)

- **`sandbox.allow_host_bash` security migration** — as of 2026-03-29 (`92c7a20`), `LocalSandboxProvider` defaults to `allow_host_bash: false`. Existing deployments that relied on host bash execution must explicitly add `sandbox.allow_host_bash: true` to their `config.yaml`. This is intentional — the old default was a security vulnerability. Do not restore the old default.

- **`LANGSMITH_*` env var naming** — `LANGCHAIN_TRACING_V2` / `LANGCHAIN_API_KEY` still work (fallback supported since `96dbee0`, 2026-03-11), but `LANGSMITH_*` is the preferred form. New documentation and examples should use `LANGSMITH_*`.
